name: Schemathesis (Property-Based API Testing)
pricing_notes: Open source (MIT); Dmitry Dygalo; SaaS app.schemathesis.io is commercial

auth.notes: Passes auth headers to tested API; SaaS has own auth

performance.notes: Depends on tested API; generates hundreds of test cases

agent_readiness.notes: Property-based testing for APIs via OpenAPI/GraphQL specs. Generates test cases from schema, finds edge cases automatically. CLI: `schemathesis run http://api/openapi.json`. pytest integration: @schema.parametrize(). Stateful testing (sequences of API calls). Finds: 500 errors, schema mismatches, missing auth checks. Built on Hypothesis. Auto-discovers bugs without manual test case writing. DAST approach for API security testing. app.schemathesis.io provides cloud execution and bug tracking.

gotchas: Requires well-formed OpenAPI spec for best results
Generates large test suites — can be slow on complex APIs
Stateful testing needs care to avoid side effects on real data
May find false positives in non-deterministic endpoints
best_when: API security testing without writing test cases manually
Finding edge cases and 500 errors in REST APIs
CI regression testing of API schema conformance
avoid_when: APIs with heavy state/side effects (use with caution)
When unit tests are more appropriate than integration fuzzing
summary: Schemathesis performs property-based testing of REST APIs by generating test cases from OpenAPI specs. Auto-discovers 500 errors, schema mismatches, and missing auth checks without manual test writing. CLI and pytest integration. Stateful test sequences. Built on Hypothesis. Best for automated API regression testing and security fuzzing from OpenAPI specs. Excellent at finding edge cases that manual tests miss.
